overview: A full-featured grocery delivery web app inspired by Zepto — India's fastest grocery delivery platform. Includes product browsing, category navigation, shopping cart, animated search, and a complete purple-branded design system.
features: Animated search bar cycling through product suggestions
Category tabs navigation (All, Cafe, Fresh, Electronics, Beauty, Fashion)
Product cards with ADD/quantity controls and discount badges
Sliding cart sidebar with item management
Multiple product sections (Laundry, Cleaning, Rice, Dal, Personal Hygiene, Hair Care)
Footer with app download links and policy links
